Lukas Andersen

Senior engineer building AI systems for service businesses

Blog

I'm a senior full stack engineer and technical operator with 12+ years building complex software systems — data visualization platforms, multi-tenant architecture, engineering teams from the ground up. I've led teams at companies scaling from early stage through acquisition.

Now I work at the intersection of AI and operations, building automations that handle the coordination, scheduling, and communication work that keeps service businesses running.

What I Do

AI Operations for Service Businesses

I design and build AI systems that automate the operational core of service companies — dispatch, customer communication, scheduling, follow-up. Not chatbots. Real workflow automation that replaces manual coordination.

Technical Leadership

I've built and led engineering teams through high-growth scaling, complex migrations, and zero-to-one product launches. Available for fractional or advisory engagements with AI-native teams.

Systems Architecture

Deep experience in TypeScript, React, and modern infrastructure. I build tools and systems designed to compound — each piece makes the next one easier.

Now

I'm building Grund — an AI operations toolkit for service businesses. My current focus is automating end-to-end operations for a pest control company: intake, scheduling, routing, customer communication, and reporting.

Turning manual workflows into systems that run themselves. I publish what I learn along the way.
